economic_notes: Subsidiaries include Metepenagiag Heritage Park Inc., 651738 N.B. Ltd. (Riverside Entertainment Centre), Metepenagiag Economic Ventures Corporation, Metepenagiag Moncton Lands 1 Corporation, and Metepenagiag Moncton Lands 2 Corporation. Moncton 2 rent and Big Hole Fish rent recorded as ISC revenue account items.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 5 subsidiaries fully consolidated on line-by-line basis. Restricted cash comprises Operating CMHC $2,175 and Reserve CMHC $28,276. ISC funds on deposit decreased significantly from $237,878 to $77,296 due to Band Council Resolutions withdrawing $400,000. Net debt increased from $15,145,747 to $16,166,561. Remuneration schedule referenced pages 29-30 but not included in provided images. Expenses include Lands and trusts $2,207,994 and Economic development $924,960 not mapped to standard categories. Other expenses $18,875,628 is large and may include enterprise/commercial activity costs.
